description: Runtime constitutional verification for AI answers — claim reasoning, ECS, red team, audits.
name: io.github.TheBarmaEffect/glassbox-framework

environmentVariables.description: Your Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...). Required for the claim extractor, red team, constitution engines, and ECS coherence checks. One v1 tool (generate_trust_card) works without an API key — it's pure assembly + deterministic audit hashing.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the Claude model used by the verification engines. Defaults to claude-sonnet-4-6.
environmentVariables.name: GLASSBOX_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Per-engine-call max-tokens cap. Defaults to 2048; raise for verifying long-form content.
environmentVariables.name: GLASSBOX_MAX_TOKENS

environmentVariables.description: ECS aggregation mode: arithmetic (weighted mean, default) or geometric (stricter — any zero dimension collapses the total).
environmentVariables.name: GLASSBOX_ECS_MODE
